user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Configure Sonos album art color sync for Hue lights.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows the active track title, artist, album, and album art.
data_description.light_entities: Main Hue lights or groups to control. If a selected room or group exposes member lights, colors are distributed across those members.
data_description.color_accuracy_mode: Choose the overall extraction style. Natural is balanced, Vivid favors saturated accents, and Album Accurate keeps more muted or neutral artwork tones.
data_description.color_purity: Choose how strongly the integration favors saturated colors versus faithful album tones. Presets preserve the same underlying color behavior without requiring a numeric slider.
data_description.white_handling: Controls how white and light neutral tones are treated separately from Color Purity Preset.
data_description.white_level: Adjusts how strongly white and light neutral tones are reduced. 0 preserves whites. 100 suppresses whites strongly.
data_description.color_count: Number of album-art colors to keep, from 1 to 10. If there are more target lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds when applying album colors.
data_description.auto_rotate_colors: Legacy compatibility option. New installs should use Color Rotation instead.
data_description.rotation_mode: Choose whether colors rotate off, once per track change, continuously while music plays, or both.
data_description.auto_rotate_interval: Seconds between continuous color rotations when Color Rotation includes Continuous.
data_description.restore_delay: Seconds to wait before restoring the previous light state after playback stops or sync is disabled.
data_description.group_entities: Optional extra Hue groups to include in addition to the main targets.
data_description.member_light_entities: Optional individual Hue lights to include in addition to the main targets.
data_description.exclude_light_entities: Lights to leave untouched even if they are included through a selected group.
data_description.assignment_strategy: Controls how palette colors are assigned across standard lights.
data_description.palette_ordering: Controls whether vivid or dominant colors are prioritized first.
data_description.true_gradient_mode: Use native multi-color Hue gradients on supported gradient lights.
data_description.gradient_order_mode: Controls how colors are arranged on gradient-capable Hue lights. Dark-to-light and light-to-dark are locked layout choices that use full-palette luminance ordering after Artwork Style changes. Gradient lights also anchor their representative color to the final palette so non-white covers do not leave white behind.
data_description.gradient_color_points: Number of colors sent to each supported gradient light.
data_description.gradient_brightness: Brightness used for supported gradient lights.
data_description.min_brightness: Lowest brightness used for standard lights.
data_description.max_brightness: Highest brightness used for standard lights.
data_description.monochrome_mode: Controls behavior for black-and-white or very low-color album art.
data_description.low_color_handling: Stabilizes palettes for album art with very few usable colors.
data_description.artwork_fallback_mode: Controls what happens when album art is unavailable or cannot be processed.
data_description.cache: Remember album palettes to avoid reprocessing the same artwork.
data_description.expand_groups: Apply colors to individual lights within selected Hue groups when possible.
data_description.airplay_poll_interval: Fallback metadata check interval for sources that do not reliably send Sonos events.
data_description.palette_coherence: Controls whether visually isolated colors are kept or removed. Off keeps all extracted colors, Balanced removes obvious outliers, and Strict keeps a more unified palette.
data_description.artwork_style: Choose Auto for hands-off per-track detection, or choose a fixed artwork interpretation preset.
data_description.auto_style_behavior: Controls how Auto shapes the final palette after detecting the artwork type: balanced, more accurate, more vivid, or more ambient.
data_description.neutral_tone_handling: Choose how whites, blacks, grays, and other neutral tones should behave.
data_description.gradient_neutral_suppression: For supported Hue gradient lights, controls whether gray, black, or white-like gradient anchors are replaced with colorized palette anchors when strong non-neutral album colors are available. This helps prevent gradient lamps from showing unwanted white on vivid covers.

init.title: Sonos Hue Sync options
init.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.
